name: serenity-chan-data-acquisition-policy
purpose: Define the source ladder, materiality, and decision limits for each required research dataset.

source_ladder.role: Official filings, exchange disclosures, SEC/HKEX/CNINFO/company IR evidence.
Licensed structured databases for statements, market data, estimates, and ownership.
Open automated preflight data for quote/history and non-final checks.
Structured preflight evidence that must be verified before high-conviction ratings.
Human or agent retrieval task generated when automation cannot clear a material gap.

current_quote.decision_limit_when_missing: No current price, valuation reference, or buy-point conclusion.

financials.verification_rule: L3 structured preflight must be reconciled against L0/L1 before S/A ratings.

share_capital.decision_limit_when_missing: Market cap and valuation multiples remain gated.
share_capital.verification_rule: Quote-derived share counts are preflight evidence and must be reconciled against official or licensed capital structure before final valuation claims.

valuation_inputs.decision_limit_when_missing: No market-implied growth, PE/PS, payoff upgrade, or action-priority upgrade.
valuation_inputs.verification_rule: Total shares, current price, total market cap, currency, and as-of date must share a consistent basis. Float shares and float market cap must be captured when the source exposes them; otherwise liquidity/free-float analysis must remain explicit.

customer_order_capacity_evidence.decision_limit_when_missing: Theme and customer claims remain leads.

peer_valuation.decision_limit_when_missing: Relative payoff must be framed as provisional.

valuation_inputs: Tencent quote market-cap and share-count fields

financials: SEC companyfacts US-GAAP / IFRS XBRL facts from 10-K, 10-Q, 20-F, or 40-F
SEC companyconcepts US-GAAP / IFRS XBRL facts from 10-K, 10-Q, 20-F, or 40-F

valuation_inputs: HKEX annual/interim/monthly return/next-day disclosure issued-share evidence plus Yahoo HK current quote
HKEX announcements, annual/interim reports, monthly returns, and next-day disclosure returns
